title: Mos Eisley Mourners
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Mos Eisley Mourners''' were four [[DX-series]] [[Battle droid/Legends|war droids]] hidden at [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] as a fail safe against his possible [[Assassin/Legends|assassination]].

==History==
Ancient, pre-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] droids, the Mourners were pre-programmed with instructions to kill anyone on a list of Jabba's enemies who the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] viewed as possible instigator to an assassination, starting with the most recent. Some of the potential victims of the droids were [[Eugene Talmont]], [[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]], Lady [[Valarian/Legends|Valarian]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] cell leader [[Jun Seros (Whiphid)|Jun Seros]].

They intoned repeatedly the following chant: "We mourn for the exalted Jabba. We cry for the magnificent Jabba. We grieve for the illustrous Jabba."

Seros called in the help of visiting Rebel operatives to take out the droids, aided by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], local police and some of Valarian's goons.

The droids were armed with rectractable [[Vibro-ax/Legends|vibro-axes]], a pair of [[Heavy repeating blaster/Legends|heavy repeating blasters]], and covered with armor.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-09-XX -->''[[Rebellion Era Sourcebook]]''
